title: Melilotoides adscendens
taxonomy: Melilotoides adscendens is a species within the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the legume family. It is native to various regions, including Europe, Asia, and Africa. This species is often classified within the tribe Trifolieae, which includes other legumes like clover and trefoil. Further classification may also include the genus Melilotus, but this is still a matter of research and debate. More specific classification within the plant kingdom would require further research into its taxonomic relationships.
